sections.title: Standard dialogue before The Grand Tree

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Welcome to Gnome Air!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's Gnome Air?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Gnome Air is the finest airline in Gielinor!

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Well...it's the only real airline in Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Ha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean by real airline?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Well there's a dodgy magic carpet operation in the desert, I doubt it will ever take off... Ha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can you take me?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Glough has ordered that I only take gnomes on Gnome Air.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much for one-way to Varrock?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: I can't take you anywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: I would, but Glough has told me not to take humans on Gnome Air.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you take me on the glider?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Of course!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are gliders better than other transport?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Oh we have a whole network! It's wonderful for getting to hard to reach places.

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: There are so many places where your teleports cannot reach!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you all manage to build such an established network?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: I think you'll find that is a gnome trade secret!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't want anything now.

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: I don't think I can fix this. Looks like I'll be heading back by foot.

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: Ah, how embarrassing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: A bit of a technical hitch with the landing gear. I won't be able to fly you anywhere, sorry.

lines.speaker: Captain Errdo
lines.text: An excellent delivery. Thank you.
